docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY DAO, QUY AS TO DEFENDANT SELLARDS, ROBERT M , ESQ WHITE, JAMIL L. , ESQ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAO, QUY AS TO DEFENDANT SELLARDS, ROBERT M , ESQ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF QUY DAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT M SELLARDS, ESQ AND JAMIL WHITE, ESQ IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAO, QUY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SELLARDS, ROBERT M , ESQ WHITE, JAMIL L. , ESQ $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,080.00, DEFENDANT WHITE PROPERLY SERVED; FAILED TO APPEAR; PLAINTIFF TESTIMONY ESTABLISHED DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR FEES AS INTERPRETER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-03-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE, JAMIL L. , ESQ
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SELLARDS, ROBERT M , ESQ WHITE, JAMIL L. , ESQ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-31-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SELLARDS, ROBERT M , ESQ
